prompt: Estimate or interpret the measurable condition and state why it is out of tolerance.
scenario: In a T2 work setting, the evaluated element is E-204 Boxes, fittings & fill within 2.1 Electrical. The relevant subcategory is 2.1.2 Raceway. The observed field condition is: missing box extension on deep finish. The work is being assessed at the rough-complete lifecycle state with source anchors NEC 314.16, 300.14, 314.28 (pull box sizing). The measurable cue is visible enough to estimate whether the condition is within tolerance.
title: T2 E-204 Measurement & estimation
